reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, buena calidad de RRHH. También se puede desayunar, almorzar, merendar, y compartir con amigos y familia en su bar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, good quality staff. You can also have breakfast, lunch, afternoon tea, and socialize with friends and family in their bar.
